summary: Data Ownership Refinement Testing Complete - All roster, reassignment, and unassign features verified. Backend: 21/21 tests pass (100%). Frontend: 100% success. Roster page shows athletes grouped by coach, reassign/unassign modals work, coaches cannot access roster.
critical_code_review_comments: roster.py correctly implements _require_director() check on all director-only endpoints
Reassignment creates proper audit log entry with type, from_coach, to_coach, reason, reassigned_by
Unassign correctly sets unassigned_reason label for timeline display
RosterPage.js has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Header.js conditionally renders Roster tab only for directors via user.role check
seed_data_creation: None - used existing athletes. Test cleanup restores athlete_3→coach-williams, athlete_4→coach-garcia
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Ownership Refinement (iteration 24) verified. Roster page at /roster is director-only. All reassign/unassign APIs work correctly with audit logging. Valid athlete IDs: athlete_1 through athlete_25. Coach Williams has 13 athletes, Coach Garcia has 12 athletes. athlete_3 belongs to coach-williams, athlete_4 belongs to coach-garcia.

GET /api/roster/coaches - Returns list of all coaches ✓
Unassigned group appears in roster with reason labels ✓

Roster tab NOT visible for coach ✓
